name: OpenAI Codex
description: Subscription-backed OpenAI Codex runtime using device-code sign-in. Exposes Responses, chat/vision, and image generation tools for apps that need OpenAI model calls without an OpenAI API key.

tools.name: responses_create
tools.description: Create a response through the subscription-backed Codex Responses runtime. Accepts the Responses API request shape: model, input, instructions, tools, text, max_output_tokens, temperature, stream, and store.

model.description: Codex/runtime model to use. Omit to use the account-aware Terra/default fallback.

input.description: Responses API input: a string or array of input items.

tools.description: Responses API tools such as function tools.

tools.name: chat_completion
tools.description: Compatibility wrapper for OpenAI-style chat completions. Converts messages, including multimodal image_url parts, into a Codex Responses request and returns an OpenAI chat-completion shaped response.

model.description: Optional Codex model. Omit to use the account-aware Terra/default fallback.

messages.description: OpenAI chat messages. Content may be a string or an array of {type:'text'} / {type:'image_url'} parts.

response_format.description: Mapped to Responses text.format when supplied.

tools.name: vision_describe
tools.description: Alias of chat_completion for integrations that declare a vision.describe capability. Pass multimodal chat messages with image_url content parts.

model.description: Optional Codex model. Omit to use the account-aware Terra/default fallback.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image through the subscription-backed Codex Responses runtime using the hosted image_generation tool. Returns an OpenAI Images-compatible {data:[{b64_json,revised_prompt}]} response.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.

instructions.description: Responses instructions required by the Codex runtime. Tell the model to use the hosted image_generation tool and return the completed image result.
instructions.default: Generate the requested image using the hosted image_generation tool. Return the completed image result.

model.description: Optional Codex/runtime model that should call the hosted image_generation tool. Omit to use the account-aware Terra/default fallback.

size.description: Output size for the image_generation tool, e.g. 1024x1024, 1024x1536, 1536x1024, or auto.

quality.description: Rendering quality for the image_generation tool.

background.description: Background handling when supported by the image generation model.
